name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖 This sleek, slender handbag features the GG series with tonal leather trim and interlocking double-G logo, highlighting the charm of classic design. GGSupreme handbag, eco-friendly materials. Leather trim. Viscose lining, oval interlocking double-G leather logo. Two bill compartments.

Size: 26*20*5.6cm.
